title: Bunny Boots
description: These boots are crafted with 4 rabbit feet. When equipped, they allow you to step up full blocks as if it were a stair, like horses and pigs.
body: These boots are crafted with 4 rabbit hide. When equipped, they allow you to step up full blocks, like horses. Similar to the agility cape from Aether mod, but boots, and bunny! Bunnies are really cute :D
